query:
UPDATE brand_livestreams 
SET livestreamEndTime = DATE_ADD(livestreamEndTime, INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
WHERE id IN (420001, 660001, 780371)

SET livestreamEndTime = DATE_ADD(livestreamEndTime, INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
WHERE id IN (420001, 660001, 780371)
